caption: A man with short brown hair, wearing a black crew-neck shirt, appears in a small rectangular inset window within a larger screen display. He is positioned in a room featuring a decorated Christmas tree with white lights in the background. Overlaid on the screen is a purple-themed gaming interface containing text. At the top, it reads "Team Name: Saints | College: BYU | Acquired: 12/29/2022 | Source: Pack opening". Below a "DESCRIPTION" header, the text states, "MUT 23 Zero Chill Champion. This player comes with 2 Custom Ability Buckets (0 AP Short In Elite, 1 AP Red Zone Threat, 2 AP Deep Out Elite) and (1 AP TE Apprentice)." The phrase "Vertical Threat" appears in larger pink text in the center of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression changes from a neutral gaze to a wide-mouthed, excited expression.
